lesson: A ramp with an inclination of angle θ rests next to a wall. A box of mass m is sliding down the incline surface, as shown. There is no friction between any of the surfaces (ramp and the box, ramp and the horizontal surface, ramp and the wall). For the answers below, you can use θ, m and g as needed. (a) Find Ftotal, the magnitude of the sum of all forces acting on the box. (b) Find Frw, the magnitude of the force exerted by the wall on the ramp.
